title: caralluma adscendens var. fimbriata
intro: Caralluma adscendens var. fimbriata is a succulent plant species native to India, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-diabetic effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as aiding in weight loss, reducing blood sugar levels, and improving lipid profiles. Herbal preparations of Caralluma adscendens var. fimbriata include extracts and supplements, which are often used in the form of capsules or powder.
